name: Guards

traits.name: Resistances
traits.text: Damage type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait below

traits.name: Draconic Origin
traits.text: The half-dragon is related to a type of dragon associated with one of the following damage types (DM’s choice): Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. This choice affects other aspects of the stat block.

text:
# Guards

*Medium Dragon, Neutral*

### Actions

**Claw.** Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait.

**Dragon’s Breath (Recharge 5–6).** Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 28 (8d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait. Success: Half damage.
